journey.summary: Travel from Kolkata to Darjeeling by train/bus. Duration: 4-6 hours. Cost: $40

places.name: Darjeeling Himalayan Railway (Toy Train)
places.description: A UNESCO World Heritage Site, this iconic narrow-gauge railway offers a charming journey through the hills, a testament to British engineering from the late 19th century.
places.address: Darjeeling Railway Station, Darjeeling, West Bengal 734101

places.name: Ghoom Monastery (Yiga Choeling Monastery)
places.description: One of the oldest Tibetan Buddhist monasteries in Darjeeling, established in 1875. It houses a 15-foot high statue of Maitreya Buddha and ancient Buddhist manuscripts.

places.name: Japanese Peace Pagoda
places.description: Built under the guidance of Nichidatsu Fujii, a Japanese Buddhist monk, this pagoda symbolizes peace and harmony. It offers panoramic views of Darjeeling town and Kanchenjunga.

places.name: Bhutia Busty Monastery
places.description: Originally located on Observatory Hill, this monastery was rebuilt in 1879 after an earthquake. It houses a precious copy of the Tibetan Book of the Dead and is a serene historical site.
places.address: Bhutia Busty Rd, Darjeeling, West Bengal 734101

places.name: Observatory Hill and Mahakal Temple
places.description: A sacred hill where the original Dorje Ling monastery once stood. It is now home to the Mahakal Temple, a unique Hindu-Buddhist shrine, offering breathtaking views of Darjeeling and the Himalayas.

places.name: Darjeeling War Memorial
places.description: Located within the Batasia Loop of the Darjeeling Himalayan Railway, this memorial commemorates the Gorkha soldiers who sacrificed their lives for the nation. It offers stunning views and a poignant historical tribute.
